{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Grandmaster Ornheim
| appears_in = Traveler's Gate
| introduced = [[The Crimson Vault (novel)|The Crimson Vault]]
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Grandmaster Ornheim]] is an old woman with dark skin and hair, wearing a looped double necklace of blue-green stone, under a banner featuring a mountain and two crossed hammers.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c6">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
